name: What was TON and why it is over

content.text: Telegram wanted to launch a cryptocurrency, but now they stopped that experiment because a US court stopped them and the US has too much power they rather didn’t want to feel.I am writing this post to officially announce that Telegram’s active involvement with TON is over.https://telegra.ph/What-Was-TON-And-Why-It-Is-Over-05-12
content.html:
Telegram wanted to launch a cryptocurrency, but now they stopped that experiment because a US court stopped them and the US has too much power they rather didn’t want to feel.

I am writing this post to officially announce that Telegram’s active involvement with TON is over.

https://telegra.ph/What-Was-TON-And-Why-It-Is-Over-05-12
